title: Non-record: FP16 embed + MLP992 sliding-window size-repair probe
author: THUQiXuan
quantization: int8 with FP16 token embedding kept during export

data.description: Reduced MLP width to 992 as a size-repair offset

novel_contributions: Kept tied token embedding in FP16 during final int8+zlib export to recover artifact size
Reduced MLP width to 992 as a size-repair offset
Demonstrated a successful non-record research probe under 16MB on local 8x NVIDIA L20Z hardware
Skipped TTT evaluation deliberately to focus on post-quant sliding-window roundtrip metric
Provided a concrete, reproducible snapshot for future work
